children.label: commentBefore
description: A comment before this Document

children.label: comment
description: A comment immediately after this Document

children.label: contents
description: The document contents.
signature: Strict extends true ? Contents | null : Contents

children.label: errors
description: Errors encountered during parsing.

children.label: options
signature: ; intAsBigInt: boolean; keepSourceTokens: boolean; prettyErrors: boolean; stringKeys: boolean; uniqueKeys: boolean | ((a:

children.label: range
description:
The `[start, value-end, node-end]` character offsets for the part of the
source parsed into this document (undefined if not parsed). The `value-end`
and `node-end` positions are themselves not included in their respective
ranges.

children.label: schema
description: The schema used with the document. Use `setSchema()` to change.

children.label: warnings
description: Warnings encountered during parsing.

children.label: value
description: - The initial value for the document, which will be wrapped

children.label: clone
description:
Create a deep copy of this Document and its contents.

Custom Node values that inherit from `Object` still refer to their original instances.

children.label: add
description: Adds a value to the document.

children.label: addIn
description: Adds a value to the document.

children.label: createAlias
description:
Create a new `Alias` node, ensuring that the target `node` has the required anchor.

If `node` already has an anchor, `name` is ignored.
Otherwise, the `node.anchor` value will be set to `name`,
or if an anchor with that name is already present in the document,
`name` will be used as a prefix for a new unique anchor.
If `name` is undefined, the generated anchor will use 'a' as a prefix.

children.label: createNode
description:
Convert any value into a `Node` using the current schema, recursively
turning objects into collections.

children.label: createPair
description:
Convert a key and a value into a `Pair` using the current schema,
recursively wrapping all values as `Scalar` or `Collection` nodes.

children.label: delete
description: Removes a value from the document.
returnComment: `true` if the item was found and removed.

children.label: deleteIn
description: Removes a value from the document.
returnComment: `true` if the item was found and removed.

children.label: get
description:
Returns item at `key`, or `undefined` if not found. By default unwraps
scalar values from their surrounding node; to disable set `keepScalar` to
`true` (collections are always returned intact).
signature: (key: unknown, keepScalar?: boolean | undefined) => Strict extends true ? unknown : any

children.label: getIn
description:
Returns item at `path`, or `undefined` if not found. By default unwraps
scalar values from their surrounding node; to disable set `keepScalar` to
`true` (collections are always returned intact).
signature: (path: Iterable<unknown> | null, keepScalar?: boolean | undefined) => Strict extends true ? unknown : any

children.label: has
description: Checks if the document includes a value with the key `key`.

children.label: hasIn
description: Checks if the document includes a value at `path`.

children.label: set
description:
Sets a value in this document. For `!!set`, `value` needs to be a
boolean to add/remove the item from the set.

children.label: setIn
description:
Sets a value in this document. For `!!set`, `value` needs to be a
boolean to add/remove the item from the set.

children.label: setSchema
description:
Change the YAML version and schema used by the document.
A `null` version disables support for directives, explicit tags, anchors, and aliases.
It also requires the `schema` option to be given as a `Schema` instance value.

Overrides all previously set schema options.

children.label: toJS
description: A plain JavaScript representation of the document `contents`.

children.label: toJSON
description: A JSON representation of the document `contents`.
signature: (jsonArg?: string | null | undefined, onAnchor?: ((value: unknown, count: number) => void) | undefined) => any

children.label: jsonArg
description: Used by `JSON.stringify` to indicate the array index or

children.label: toString
description: A YAML representation of the document.

children.label: key
description: Always Node or null when parsed, but can be set to anything.

children.label: value
description: Always Node or null when parsed, but can be set to anything.

children.label: srcToken
description: The CST token that was composed into this pair.

children.label: toString
signature: | undefined, onComment?: (() => void) | undefined, onChompKeep?: (() => void) | undefined) => string

functions.label: loadYaml
description:
Loads the yaml package asynchronously. Use this in browser code to avoid
pulling the full yaml library into the initial bundle.
The returned promise resolves to the yaml module (parse, stringify, Document, etc.).
